title: mikania globifera
intro: Mikania globifera, also known as the globe-bearing Mikania, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mikania globifera include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Mikania globifera can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
